title: Simply Farming
description: A QoL farming plugin that auto replants crops based on vanilla values
body:
Introducing Simply Farming, a fantastic plugin that takes your Minecraft farming experience to the next level. Designed to enhance the original gameplay, Simply Farming offers a simplified yet rewarding farming experience for players. With Simply Farming, you'll have the convenient feature of right-clicking on crops to automatically replant them, ensuring a continuous harvest. Plus, you'll receive the regular drop rates from the crops, based on fortune level, allowing for a fair and balanced gameplay experience.

commands:
- /simplyfarming reload
- /simplyfarming use-permission-nodes (true/false)

permission nodes:
- simplyfarming.reload
- simplyfarming.toggle.permission-nodes
- simplyfarming.replant.beetroots
- simplyfarming.replant.carrots
- simplyfarming.replant.nether_wart
- simplyfarming.replant.potatoes
- simplyfarming.replant.wheat
- simplyfarming.replant.*
- simplyfarming.*
